page_content:
Prerequisite: ECON630; or permission of BSOS-Economics department.

ECON744 Advanced Topics in International Economics (3 Credits) Focuses on key topics in international macroeconomics. We will cover classic and recent papers on business cycles, exchange rates, capital flows, monetary and fiscal policy, sovereign debt, default, and currency denomination. The course will be orientated towards students initiating research in the field.
